page_metadata.bioconda__summary: meryl is a multi-threaded, multi-process, out-of-core k-mer counter
page_metadata.biocontainers__summary: In- and out-of-core kmer counting and utilities
page_metadata.biotools__summary: Meryl is a tool for counting and working with sets of k-mers that was originally developed for use in the Celera Assembler and has since been migrated and maintained as part of Canu.
